scores.correctness_notes: Fully matches gold standard on core OCI image resource configuration, field reference, and the key rule about containers/resources name matching.
scores.hallucination_notes: The deploy-time section (providing local YAML/JSON files with registrypath/username/password fields, and the charmcraft upload-resource command) goes beyond the gold standard. These may be valid Charmcraft features but are not part of the gold standard answer and could not be verified against it — minor risk of hallucination in the JSON/YAML credential format details.
